violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Several food items in the upright refrigerator were not date marked. Make sure items are properly date marked.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Currently they are operating without out a designated handwash sink. They are in the process of installing a new sink.
